title: Specklinia bertoniensis
taxonomy: Specklinia bertoniensis is classified as a species within the genus Specklinia, which is a group of small, epiphytic orchids. This genus belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Specklinia bertoniensis is further classified as a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae, which includes most modern orchids. The classification of Specklinia bertoniensis is further supported by its shared characteristics with other species in the genus. The overall classification of Specklinia bertoniensis is still subject to ongoing research and updates in the field of botany.
